name: Jean's Bourbon Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Sweetened Condensed Milk (14 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs on medium speed, gradually adding the sugar.
2. Add the bourbon and Eagle Sweetened Condensed Milk, mixing well.
3. Stir in the half-and-half.
4. Pour the mixture into a 1-gallon freezer container and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
5. Garnish each serving with fresh mint sprigs.
